commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=aa1f8e479436bd8f1621cb65a78f4b569a15c9d1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves core doctor lint checks into ordered doctor contributions, appends non-core registered health checks afterward, removes the temporary conversion-plan ledger, and updates doctor tests/docs around that ordering contract.

PR surface: Source -63, Tests +206, Docs +2. Total +145 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR head shows the structured-only contribution runner passes process.cwd(), while the same PR's lint path resolves the configured default-agent workspace; I did not run commands because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the PR has a protected maintainer label, is dirty against current main, and still needs contributor real behavior proof that automation cannot provide.
